reviews.review_description:
i want you to make her able to come home with me and her 


😘😘😘😘😘😘😋😛😙😙💋💋💋💋💋💋💋💋💋👙👙👙👙👙👙👙👙👙👙👙👙👙
It didnt teach me how to get sturdy. And I still don't know how to
It’s really easy to dance with this girl
I like the idea and the visual disco! But... there is one song only available at the moment.  I hope more will be coming soon, especially some great dance from the 80s or 90s.

Please give us the option of Dress on or off.
The dress really doesn't hang well, it clips and totally messes things up.

Fun game but I feel like it's kinda weird with a half naked girl, I mean this is gonna attract gooners like moth to light, overall though it's a good game that has a lot of potential when worked on :)

Be honest. You always wanted to see a pretty girl in VR. Well, here you go. The animation could be better and it probably will be after a while. For now, you just get to dance for a couple of minutes. 

There's potential for a lot of great ideas. Different music, outfits, etc. but even in its current state, it's still worth a try.

Great start. Would be great if partner could spin. I would love to see customizable avatars of all genders with choices of dance styles and times (swing, rockabilly, Bridgeton Ball). Look forward to updates.

reviews.review_title: Has Potential If Will Work on it
reviews.review_description: Hi Thanks for making it. It's descent but the girl doesn't look like she makes eye contact. And it would be better if she had a variety of fashion( skirts, dresses) rather than just a bikini. Hopefully better environment too and of course the ability to add your own In Quest storage Mp3 for different music. And Either customization of girl or have different girls to choose from. That would improve it. Thanks

developer_response.body: Yes, that's planned for next version.

reviews.review_description: The game isn’t done yet but has immense potential just imagine being able to dance to music you can upload yourself like beatsaber with mods,being able to change the model of the girl,hopefully game development will go well.

reviews.review_title: I feel like such a degenerate lol

reviews.review_description: This is a great starting point, things I'd love to see would be the avatar's ability to reflect my moves and add improvisations.
There aren’t a lot of dancing games in VR. If they improved upon this and perhaps even added multiplayer (I know it’s far-fetched), it would be a dope game,very curious to see the game grow.
The model doesn't look clunky or out of place, though the movements are a little limited to start. The ambience works well and the dance floor looks especially nice
I FINALLY found someone to dance with me.

developer_response.body: Yes, made as your good friend.
